title: Keurig Dr Pepper: A Well Diversified Beverage Company
text: Keurig Dr Pepper has staples such as Dr. Pepper and Snapple for consistency and Keurig for growth. The company has seen K-cup growth in the high single digits for a while, and has stable operations within the carbonated and non-carbonated beverage industry.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper: A Defensive Stock To Ward Off Economic Uncertainty
text: One way to ward off too much uncertainty during this challenging time is to add room to the portfolio for defensive stocks like Keurig Dr. Pepper Inc. The company offers goods that consumers will continue to buy even during a pandemic-related crisis or stagflation.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper Stock Could Continue Climb
text: Carbonated beverage giant Keurig Dr Pepper Inc (NASDAQ:KDP) is up 1.1% to trade at $39.54 at last glance, earlier hitting a record high of $39.67.
